# HaypBooks — Short Intro

HaypBooks helps small businesses manage bookkeeping, invoicing, and reporting with fast workflows and clear financial controls.

Key benefits

- Reliable double-entry ledger design, built for auditability and accuracy
- Elegant, keyboard-friendly navigation for power users (Command Palette, shortcuts)
- Fast CSV exports and robust reporting for accountants
- Intuitive onboarding so businesses can start with a demo tenant and real data in minutes

Suggested site headline and subheadline (Landing + Onboarding)

- Headline: "Modern bookkeeping that stays accurate"
- Subheadline: "Set up your organization in minutes. Powerful accounting tools without the noise."
- Primary CTA: "Start your free trial" (primary style)
- Secondary CTA: "Explore demo data" (secondary style)

Tone & microcopy recommendations

- Keep copy concise and action-oriented (imperative verbs for CTAs)
- Use helpful guidance copy inline for complex actions (e.g., tenant creation) and keep wizard steps skippable
- Avoid jargon on first-touch screens; reserve deeper accounting language for product pages or help links

Onboarding CTAs and flow hints

- After creating an organization, show a small checklist: "Set up company details — Chart of accounts — Add bank account — Import opening balances"
- Provide "Skip and finish" and "Finish setup" options so users can get to Dashboard immediately if they prefer

Accessibility & localization

- Use clear labels for all form fields (ARIA attributes where helpful)
- Keep CTAs short and translate friendly

Prepared: 2025-12-14
